bird.name: Black-breasted buttonquail
bird.summary: The black-breasted buttonquail (Turnix melanogaster) is a rare buttonquail endemic to eastern Australia. As with other buttonquails, it is…

locations.name: 雨林
locations.summary: 雨林是雨量甚多的生物區系。雨林依位置的不同分热带雨林和溫帶雨林。雨林大多数靠近赤道，在赤道经过的非洲、亚洲和南美洲都有大片的雨林。湿润的气候保证了树和植物的快速生产。同时，树和植物也为雨林中的成千上万种生物提供了食物和庇护所。雨林曾經覆蓋…

locations.name: Palmgrove National Park
locations.summary: Palmgrove is a national park in south-central Queensland, Australia.

locations.name: 重点鸟区
locations.summary: 重点鸟类和生物多样性区域（英語：Important Bird and Biodiversity Area）又称重点鸟区（Important Bird Area）、重要鸟区、重要鸟类栖息地、重点鸟类栖息地，是国际鸟盟策划并推动的一项保护工作…

relations.subject: Black-breasted buttonquail
relations.evidence: The black-breasted buttonquail is usually found in rainforests, foraging on the ground for invertebrates in large areas of thick leaf litter

relations.subject: Black-breasted buttonquail
relations.evidence: | last5=Murray | title=Distribution of Black-breasted Button-quail Turnix melanogaster in the Great Sandy Region, Queensland and associations with vegetation communities | journal= Emu – Austral Ornithology | doi=10.1080/01584197.2022.2047733 | date= March 2022| volume= 122 | issue= 1 | pages= 71–76| bibcode= 2022EmuAO.122...71W | s2cid= 247534104 }} It is found in Palmgrove National Park, which has been identified by BirdLife International as an Important Bird Area for the species. The black-breasted buttonquail was once populous on Inskip Point, with the area a destination for birdwatchers wanting to see this species
